ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Proximity to the ocean (e.g., INLAND, NEAR OCEAN, <1H OCEAN) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "median_commute_time" INTEGER /* Median commute time to work */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the housing data belongs to */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing stock */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the neighborhood */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median house value of the neighborhood */,
  "income_cat" INTEGER /* Income category of the neighborhood (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "avg_bedrooms_per_house" REAL /* Average number of bedrooms per house */,
  "avg_rooms_per_house" REAL /* Average number of rooms per house */,
  "avg_households_per_block" REAL /* Average number of households per block */,
  "avg_population_per_block" REAL /* Average population per block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_income_cat FOREIGN KEY ("income_cat") REFERENCES income_categories ("income_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range for the category (e.g., $50,000 - $75,000) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "avg_income" REAL /* Average income for the category */,
  "income_tax_bracket" TEXT /* Tax bracket associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, investor, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, view_housing_data) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_relationships_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
